ui.title: ✨ Equestria Save Point
modal.title: ✨ Confirm Restore
modal.delete_confirm:
Delete snapshot from {0}?

This cannot be undone.
err.no_backend: No backup tool found — install restic (or btrfs-progs on Btrfs)
setup.title: ✨ First Run Setup
setup.desc:
The backup repository has not been initialised yet.

Click Initialise to create a new Restic repository on your system drive. This is a one-time step and takes only a few seconds.
setup.status: Repository not set up — click Initialise
settings.title: Hook Settings
settings.hook_pacman_note: Automatically creates a save point before every pacman or yay install/upgrade/remove. Runs as root via polkit.
settings.hook_flatpak_note: Wraps the flatpak command in interactive shells to snapshot before install/update/remove. Requires a new shell session to take effect.
settings.repo_note: Changing the path will use a new location. The existing repository is not moved or deleted.
settings.delete_confirm:
Permanently delete all save points at {0}?

This cannot be undone.
settings.move_confirm:
A repository exists at {0}.

Move it to the new location {1}?
